summary: MetaMiner enlarges the set of described RiPPs via spectral networking as a fourth pipeline step.
MetaMiner requires matplotlib and networkx Python libraries for presenting Spectral Network propagation graphs.
Without matplotlib and networkx, MetaMiner generates propagation in plain text format only.
MetaMiner --spec-network option accepts path to Spectral Network output from GNPS Data Analysis workflow.
MetaMiner with --spec-network option saves results under <outdir>/spec_nets/.
